summary: Multi-tenant isolation fix validated - no cross-tenant data leak

tests.description: Login to ocb_titan and fetch payroll data
tests.expected: Return payroll data for ocb_titan only
tests.actual: Returned 21 payroll records with batch PAY-20260314-0007

tests.description: Login to ocb_unt_1 and fetch payroll data
tests.expected: Return empty data (no payroll exists for this tenant)
tests.actual: Returned empty payrolls array with employee_count: 0

tests.expected: ocb_unt_1 should NOT see ocb_titan payroll data
tests.actual: ocb_unt_1 returned empty data, ocb_titan data not leaked

changes: Replaced static collection bindings with dynamic getter functions
All collection access now uses _get_*_coll() pattern
db = get_db() called at function level for tenant context

validation_method: API testing with JWT tokens for different tenants
